ip_outcome_note: No suspected_ip on frontmatter; vision pass did not flag external IP. The depicted figures are generic Theros hoplites and an unnamed robed standard-bearer; no Scryfall, oracle text, flavor text, or Wizards article ties the art to a named lore character, so they remain anonymous.

trivia_bullets.text: Theros Beyond Death (THB) was the 83rd MTG expansion, released 2020-01-24, returning to the plane of Theros for the storyline of Elspeth's escape from Erebos's Underworld; the set's keyword lineup brought back Devotion alongside the new Escape mechanic. [mtg.wiki: Theros Beyond Death]
sources: Wizards: Theros Beyond Death Story Summary (2020-01-10)

trivia_bullets.text: The ETB ability is a near-verbatim reprise of Evangel of Heliod (Theros, 2013, #11, uncommon), which also creates 1/1 white Soldier tokens equal to devotion to white; Reverent Hoplite re-uses the same template at THB's Devotion revival, trading Evangel's Cleric subtype for Soldier and shaving one white pip off the cost ({4}{W} vs {4}{W}{W}). [Scryfall: Evangel of Heliod oracle text]

Printed flavor text: "Zeal is the sharpest blade, and piety the strongest shield." Scryfall returns no speaker attribution, so the line stands as anonymous Theros maxim rather than a named-character quote. [Scryfall]

Art is by Sidharth Chaturvedi, a Wizards illustrator since 2013 who has contributed to multiple Theros-themed Secret Lairs including the Theros Stargazing series. [artofmtg.com: Sidharth Chaturvedi artist page; Secret Lair: Artist Series: Sidharth Chaturvedi]
sources: Secret Lair: Artist Series: Sidharth Chaturvedi

trivia_bullets.text: EDHREC inclusion data: appears in ~0.63% of EDH decks tracked (25.9K of 4.08M), most often in mono-white token / soldier-tribal builds led by Myrel, Shield of Argive, Elesh Norn, Mother of Machines, Delney, Streetwise Lookout, Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd, and Greymond, Avacyn's Stalwart. Inclusion stat, not a strength claim. [EDHREC]

related_cards.name: Evangel of Heliod
related_cards.note: Mechanical predecessor — identical devotion-to-white token ETB template; Reverent Hoplite is the THB-era callback.

related_cards.name: Heliod, Sun-Crowned
related_cards.note: Same-set white god; Reverent Hoplite's flavor of zeal + piety reads as a devotee of Heliod's sun-cult, and both are pillars of THB white-devotion strategies.

related_cards.name: Myrel, Shield of Argive
related_cards.note: Top EDHREC commander pairing — mono-white soldier-tribal payoff that values Reverent Hoplite's wide token swarm.

related_cards.name: Elesh Norn, Mother of Machines
related_cards.note: Second-most-cited EDHREC commander home; her ETB-doubling effect doubles Reverent Hoplite's devotion-driven token output.

related_cards.name: Delney, Streetwise Lookout
related_cards.note: Third-cited EDHREC commander; Delney doubles ETB triggers on small creatures, which can double the soldier-token payload.
